title: Maintenance person
salary_range: 14€/h sekä TESin mukaiset lisät, oman auton käytöstä kilometrikorvaukset
what_we_expect: assess the condition of the buildings
comply with the company's level of requirements
jobcontent:
We are hiring a maintenance person for property maintenance tasks for the winter -26/27 (from 1.11.2026) in the area of Sirkka, i.e. Levi.

Experience in physical and scheduled work is an advantage, as well as a B driver's license and own car. However, work attitude, the ability to use common sense, initiative and good communication skills are more important. Work collars must be kept in hand, work is done independently. The job includes on-call shifts.

The work is focused on the end of the week, when you can enjoy the fell's millions of leisure activities on a weekday, or go hiking in the neighboring fells, of which there are plenty here. We will help you find an apartment.

Contact by email, no phone calls

title: A cleaner
jobcontent:
We are hiring employees for the winter -26/27 (starting on 1.11.2026) in Sirkka, i.e. Levi, for villa and holiday apartment cleaning. In addition to cleaning, the work also includes snow removal, deliveries of firewood, procurement of supplies, etc. No two working days are the same, nor are there any cancellations due to the freezing point or weather :-D We have a small work community where we are flexible both ways.

Experience in physical and scheduled work is an advantage, but not necessary, as is a B driver's license. However, work attitude, the ability to use common sense, initiative and good communication skills are more important. The work is done with a partner and independently, and situations often change very unpredictably. You must be able to speak English because the area is full of international tourists. The work is focused on the end of the week, when you can enjoy the fell's millions of leisure activities on a weekday, or go hiking in the neighboring fells, of which there are plenty here. We will help you find an apartment.

Contact by email, no phone calls

title: Home and cleaning service worker
jobapply_link: mailto:satu.krk@outlook.com?subject=Application for the Job - Koti- ja siivouspalvelutyöntekijä
what_we_expect: take care of personal hygiene requirements when cleaning
jobcontent:
The work is mainly cleaning and housekeeping tasks in customers' homes. There are a few companies on the job list and they are generally handled in the morning before 9 a.m. The working hours vary and are negotiable.

The job description varies between customer sites, because we listen to and implement the customers' wishes regarding cleaning or other tasks. So you might wash toilets in the morning, windows during the day and mow the lawn in the afternoon or have a coffee with a customer and have a nice chat. The work also includes laundry maintenance at the company's premises. At customer locations, in addition to traditional cleaning work, we can wash and hang laundry, help the customer take a shower, or even find out phone numbers and book a hairdresser.

The work is physical and the working time is largely spent on one's feet. We take carpets outside to be tamped, move things in front of the windows if necessary and carry the tools with us. A good basic condition is therefore a bonus and makes your work easier.

The work is seasonal.

I answer the phone best during office hours, e-mails in the evening

title: Chef
what_we_expect: comply with food-related health, safety, hygiene and other relevant legislation
work in a group in the tourism, accommodation or catering sector
control the quality of the food
hand over the cooking space to the next shift
jobcontent:
We need teammates who can keep the tools in hand and the package together even under pressure and the ability to work in a fast-paced atmosphere without forgetting humor. You are enthusiastic and able to meet customers also in the hall side in customer service tasks. Are you the person we are looking for..? We are looking for a person with work experience for a part-time employment relationship.

What do we hope you bring to the team?

- experience in the field
 
- passion for coarse food
 
- genuine customer-oriented attitude
 
- the ability to work in a team and independently
 
- you have good problem solving skills, you are quick under pressure and you have the ability to be precise in your actions.
 
- for the task, you need Finnish language skills, other language skills are considered an advantage.
 

What do we offer you? A challenging and versatile set of tasks - a good opportunity to develop - a large and experienced organization nice top professionals as colleagues from whom you learn and learn new things - an opportunity to develop your skills

How did it seem? Could you be our new colleague? Welcome to work in a nice team in the middle of flavors! Send your application with salary request, CV with attachments to rekrytointi@sauhu.bar. Don't wait, the place will be filled as soon as a suitable one is found! If you have any questions about what you do or about working for us, we will be happy to talk to you.

Inquiries: Johanna 0401580893, Kati 0407316423

www.sauhu.bar / www.sauhu.menu IG: sauhubistrobar FB: Sauhu Bistro & Bar

- Sauhu Järvenpää, Alankotie 1
 

Our Flame Burns For You (TM) No Rowing Without Fire (TM)

See job description

title: Restaurant manager, Sauhu Gourmet Oy, Sauhu - Bistro&Bar, Järvenpää
jobapply_link: mailto:rekrytointi@sauhu.bar?subject=Application for the Job - Ravintolapäällikkö, Sauhu Gourmet Oy, Sauhu - Bistro&Bar, Järvenpää
what_we_expect: comply with food-related health, safety, hygiene and other relevant legislation
work in a group in the tourism, accommodation or catering sector
maintains a clean, hygienic and safe working environment
know the nutritional value of food
what_we_offer: a nice working community and varied working days
responsible and versatile set of tasks
full-time two-shift work, with an emphasis on evenings and weekends, and a long-term employment relationship
the opportunity to develop your skills
nice top professionals from a large and experienced organization as co-workers, from whom you learn and learn new things
actual compensation for your lost free time
How did it seem? Could you be our new colleague? Welcome to work in a nice team in the middle of flavors!

We review applications and meet those interested in the position already during the application period. So don't wait! If you have any questions about your job or working for us, we will be happy to answer your questions.
For more information, contact Kati on 040 731 6423
jobcontent:
RESTAURANT MANAGER!

Have you always been the team captain while also enjoying working together? Speed ​​and dangerous situations are part of the sport, yet you always manage to lead, cheer and guide to reach the best result together.

Hit the spot? Are you a SAUHU BISTRO&BAR RESTAURANT MANAGER? We are looking for a team leader in Sauhu Järvenpää!

We offer a fast-paced and relaxed work environment where you can implement your skills and make use of the managerial experience you have already accumulated. A precise, quality-loving and nimble grip that demands it from others is the thing, without forgetting humor even in tight corners. Your happy, positive attitude is infectious! Committing to operating methods and systems according to chain management is just a no-brainer for you. It feels good that you don't have to do it all by yourself, but the organization's support team will help you. You are a flexible team player! However, at your offices, you are the captain who keeps the reins in your hands and the quality of the operations high. Sauhu's enterprise resource planning system will help you in your day-to-day activities, and versatile monitoring and reporting features have been created to make your work easier.

What do we hope you bring?

- experience in the field and in manager-level positions
 
- genuine passion for a dazzling customer experience
 
- the ability to work in a team and independently
 
- good problem solving skills, you are quick, you work well under pressure and you have the ability to be precise in your actions
 
- experience and know-how also from the kitchen side
 
- for the task, you need Finnish language skills, other language skills are considered an advantage
 
- basic IT skills are also considered an advantage
 
- the hygiene and dispensing passports are already in your pocket
 

What do we offer you?

- a nice working community and varied working days
 
- a responsible and versatile set of tasks
 
- full-time two-shift work, with an emphasis on evenings and weekends, and a long-term employment relationship
 
- the opportunity to develop your skills
 
- nice top professionals from a large and experienced organization as colleagues, from whom you learn and learn new things
 
- reasonable compensation for your lost free time
 

How did it seem? Could you be our new colleague? Welcome to work in a nice team in the middle of flavors!

Send your application with salary request and CV with attachments to rekrytointi@sauhu.bar.

We review applications and meet those interested in the position already during the application period. So don't wait! If you have any questions about your job or working for us, we will be happy to answer your questions.

For more information, contact Kati on 040 731 6423

See the job description, rekrytointi@sauhu.bar, Kati 040 731 6423
